$comment: Compat scoreboard fixtures — popular OSS workflows + synthetic feature-surface tests we run rh against on every PR + nightly. Each row pins (repo|local_workflow|local_repo, ref, workflow path, expected outcome). Add when reality changes; never to soften an assertion.

fixtures.name: typey
fixtures.rationale: Canonical first-external-repo validation target. 9-cell os×bun matrix; we filter to ubuntu since cross-OS needs Docker.

fixtures.name: kleur
fixtures.rationale: v0.6.17 worktree ELOOP regression target. Workflow uses c8 coverage which walks the source tree; pre-fix this hit Windows ELOOP. We don't require pass — workflow has unrelated legacy-Node-version failures — but ZERO `ELOOP` mentions in the log.

fixtures.name: is-plain-obj
fixtures.rationale: Tiny package, fast install. Smoke test for the host-shim path (actions/checkout, setup-node, no real action download).

fixtures.name: workflow-dispatch-input
fixtures.rationale: v0.6.16 workflow_dispatch + --input/-i target. Synthetic workflow asserts via bash `test` that the sentinel string round-trips through ${{ inputs.sentinel }}.

fixtures.name: needs-outputs
fixtures.rationale: Job-output flow via needs.X.outputs.Y. Pins the v0.6.16 umbrella-job pattern that handles both top-level needs and reusable-workflow callers.

fixtures.name: matrix-include-exclude
fixtures.rationale: matrix.include + matrix.exclude semantics. Each cell asserts its own (node, env) pair is allowed; the excluded (16, prod) cell would fail loudly if the planner emits it.

fixtures.name: cache-hashfiles
fixtures.rationale: actions/cache shim + ${{ hashFiles(...) }} expression. Asserts cache-hit output is well-formed (true/false), not empty/undefined.

fixtures.name: nested-reusable
fixtures.rationale: KNOWN-FAIL (added 2026-05-07): 3-deep reusable workflow chain (caller → mid → terminal). The terminal job emits a sentinel correctly, but the caller's `needs.via-mid.outputs.sentinel` reads as empty — when the inner reusable is itself further expanded, scheduler.ts::evalUmbrellaOutputs doesn't propagate outputs up the chain. Pins the depth-4 invariant from v0.6.15 + the umbrella synthesis from v0.6.16. To fix: scheduler.ts evalUmbrellaOutputs must follow the inner-key map recursively (or the planner must inline the outputsSpec across nested umbrellas).

fixtures.name: composite-of-composite
fixtures.rationale: KNOWN-FAIL (added 2026-05-07): Local composite action whose runs.steps[0] is itself `uses: ./.github/actions/inner` — i.e. composite calls composite. rh's planner.ts::planSteps expands the OUTER composite into PlannedSteps but doesn't recurse on the inner steps' `uses:`. Result: `⊘ uses: ./.github/actions/inner (no shim, no-op)`. To fix: planSteps should call expandComposite recursively, OR expandComposite should inline nested composites itself.

fixtures.name: services-postgres
fixtures.rationale: Container backend with `services: postgres:`. Wires the service container on a Docker network with --alias postgres, runs the job container on the same network, and the step's `psql -h postgres` returns the sentinel. Originally registered known-fail (2026-05-07) because the local Windows host (Docker Desktop) couldn't reach the daemon — the GH-hosted ubuntu runner the compat workflow uses confirmed it works on a real Linux + Docker host (2026-05-09). Pins the headline 32× speedup-vs-act claim in marketing copy.
